alkylation reagent: 100 mM iodoacetamide was added, and the samples were incubated in darkness for 30 min.
cleavage agent: the proteins were digested with trypsin (Promega, USA) overnight at 37 °C...
collision energy: the normalized collision energy was set to 30 eV.
enrichment method: the peptide mixtures were processed with a HiSelect TiO2 Phosphopeptide Enrichment Kit...
instrument: A Q Exactive Plus mass spectrometer (Thermo Fisher Scientific, USA)...
ionization type: operated in the positive ion mode.
labeling: the peptides were labeled using TMT reagents...
reduction reagent: 100 mM dithiothreitol (DTT), 4% SDS, and 150 mM Tris–HCl.
